All very good questions
Sue.

One thing to keep in mind is that all humans drink their urine for nine months in the womb.

There is no cap on the genitals both male and female pee into the space they are floating in. The cap is on the colon, that is the waste that goes out the umbilical cord.

So the fact the babies loop it all before they are born is a clue that it gets cleaner and cleaner the more times you loop it.

I know from experience that looping it again and again it gets cleaner and cleaner, you dump any toxins at the liver everytime you loop it.

Also keep in mind that of all the urine that the kidneys make, over 90% goes back into the blood stream. This is all the good stem cells and nutrients exactly the same as the roughly ten percent that goes to the bladder.

As for toxins, the liver is constantly cleaning the blood, the waste goes out one of the excreated ion channels your poop, sweat and out breath. Then the good cleaned blood goes to the kidneys to be regulated. The excess good stuff gets taken out of the blood and into urine which then goes slowly back into the blood stream, and a little of the excess goes to the bladder.

There are really only very very small amounts of any remaining toxins left in the urine, just the right amount to teach the body how to get rid of them and build antibodies to fight them.

### Solidsilverteeth — 2019-04-20T17:26:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/first-post.23533/post-268499>

Thanks for this link Sue.

What is in urine? [https://www.livescience.com/39453-urine-chemical-composition.html](https://www.livescience.com/39453-urine-chemical-composition.html)

3000 identified substances and counting. My guess is there are many more thousands of as yet unidentifiable unknown wonderful substances that are made by the body for the body. We don't even need to know, just trust nature.

This is from my book OMAD Orin Looping.......

Why does the body make urine and excrete it, if it’s so good for us?
The production of urine involves highly complex steps of distillation and re-absorption. Most of the finished product called urine is reabsorbed back into the blood, only about between 2-10% goes to the bladder. This process is necessary to maintain a stable balance of body chemicals.
The kidneys also actually manufacture and produce hormones that affect the function of other organs. For example, a hormone produced by the kidneys stimulates red blood cell production. Other hormones produced by the kidneys help regulate blood pressure and control calcium metabolism.
The kidneys are powerful chemical factories that perform the most amazing function of regulating the blood. Remember the liver takes out anything bad, and the clean good blood is sent to the kidneys to be regulated. The liver is the primary workforce it produces yes actually creates lots of good things to go into the blood, this mega factory in your body even has storehouses and warehouses which can be tapped into and put into the ultrafiltered blood plasma (urine) when needed. This is also true about the kidneys but to a lesser extent. Your two kidneys as well as your liver together actually produce a plethora of good substances balancing the body's bloodstream. Sometimes taking out the excess of some things, and other times along with the liver actually producing good things to put into the urine, which 90% goes back unto the blood and upto 10% goes to your bladder. The other way to say taking out, or putting in is regulating. The kidneys regulate your now cleaned by the liver bloodstream.
For example, somebody who doesn't get outside in the sun much the kidneys themselves manufacture and produce an active form of vitamin D that promotes strong, healthy bones. This is just one example of countless good substances that if you have deficiencies then your body does it’s best to regulate. Same with too much of anything, good or bad. The bad stuff gets taken out by the liver, and the good stuff gets sent to the kidneys to be regulated. Once again because this is so important the kidneys regulate the cleaned blood that the liver has cleaned and decided is good for you, many substances, chemicals and water are either added to or removed from this filtered fluid according to the body's needs. If you loop it then it just goes round and round so your body can use it again and again.
You are the device. You are all that you need. Supplement manufactures want you to believe that you are so broken that you need all these extra supplements. You need to buy fancy liver and kidney flush packs and products. When the truth is all you need to do is go on omad orin looping and your body will soon sort out any toxicity or deficiencies. The Omad orin looping programme will clean the body right the way through. This is the best ever kidney and liver flush.

> The question I would like to know is how much alluminium is actually in a day's worth of urine? I can't find exact amounts but it seems a very very small amount. Same with any other toxins.

Low levels might reflect that in our distant past we were never expected to be exposed to aluminium to the levels of the modern world. The systemic sinks and sources section in the aluminium article gives some info on the "sinks" where it finishes up. I've read that in rats, the half life of brain aluminium has been estimated at approx 150 days.That's a lot of time to hang around and do damage. Apart from its effects as a stand alone agent, according to the researcher Stephanie Seneff's hypothesis, the organophosphate glyphosate binds to aluminium and takes it to the pineal.

### Sue-UK — 2019-04-21T18:07:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/first-post.23533/post-268560>

> [Solidsilverteeth said:](/goto/post?id=268498)
>
> Imagine a supplement that can change throughout the day and give your body exactly what it needs at the right time, exactly what the body needs at that time and is bio available recognised to be used straight away. You just imagined your own orin.

If I am out in the sun, the wavelengths of light can initiate different hormones, and turn them on and off at the right time chronobiologically. Frequencies of light can also transmute one element into another. Real food grown at the latitude I live at gives information from the photosynthetic food web, as well as measurable nutrients. I can raise my dopamine by seeing a sunrise, or getting into ice cold water when temperature trumps light in the winter. Or I can raise my dopamine by meeting up with one of my friends for lunch, even anticipating that meet up can raise dopamine. Comparing any endogenously triggered hormone, or a vitamin or mineral in a locally grown food to one that has been made in a dish in the lab, biochemically they may be identical, but on an information level, I don’t see them as the same. We may re-use compounds, but at some point, if the i_nformation_ has been extracted from the endogenously produced compound, vitamin or mineral etc, then it’s whether it’s now the informational equivalent of a compound made in a lab. And whether relooping compounds that have already given up their information or gone beyond their best before date would signal to stop making any more, implying the potential loss of gaining new information. So for me it’s also about the biophysics, not just the biochemistry.

Bears don’t make urine or faeces during hibernation. If humans have a shortened hibernation, say 2 hours during the night, and a circadian rhythm as to when ADH is at its peak, then that implies to me that there is a either a chronobiological time to make the least amount of urine and so recycle what the body wants, or it’s a function of one of the phases of sleep (possibly REM). I’d also be concerned that compounds dumped into the early morning urine would reflect compounds usually only produced during the night and eliminated in the morning urine, and I’d want to know what drinking them outside of their normal circadian rhythm might do. I don’t think mother nature made a mistake not stopping us making urine at all so that we recycle everything, or not giving us an anatomy that hooks up the bladder to the mouth. Apart from things like exclusion zone, good quality drinking water brings in new information from the environment, urine might be just yesterday’s news.

I almost see it as the liver is the solar organ, and the kidneys are the lunar organs. As you can see, I imagine orin a little differently.

### Sue-UK — 2019-04-22T13:45:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/first-post.23533/post-268602>

> [Solidsilverteeth said:](/goto/post?id=268578)
>
> Did you know that when you raise your dopamine levels from good genuine feelings like meeting real friends then that dopamine will be in your water of life, and you get another hit of it next time you loop. You get more great feelings again and again.

I don't think I want another hit of it next time I loop. Every day is a new sunrise, a new beginning, new experiences with the potential to raise dopamine. Acutely an animal might find therapeutic value in drinking their own urine, but chronically could be a different matter. An animal that is truly connected to the environment might find their dopamine levels dropping, and over time that could be the signal to change their environment or their conditions of existence ... move, migrate for the winter, hibernate, whatever.

I'd be wondering if looping dopamine through my urine has the potential to stop me seeking new experiences, keep me repeating old familiar patterns that no longer serve me, or stop me letting go of relationships I might recognise as unhealthy etc if I wasn't self medicating with urine.

If you had an identical twin, and they were healthy and you weren't, would you self medicate with their urine ...?

### Solidsilverteeth — 2019-04-18T10:45:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/omad-orin-looping.23534/post-268338>

I wrote a book called OMAD orin looping some years ago. Here are some ideas in brief

Nothing has been taken away from my OMAD orin looping protocol over the years one meal a day and loop all orin produced while focusing on light and electro magnetism.

My focus is really on light, water, magnetism and something often left out is joy. The Bible says a joyful heart is the best medicine. Focus on joy and being happy.

Sunshine, I'm fanatical about watching the sunrise, then looking at the sun regularly right through to sunset. no blue lights, wear blue blockers no lights after sundown without wear blue blockers.

Drink only Orin water, spend time in rivers or ocean or natural water for grounding and cold therapy, use low dueterium water if need to top up own water levels.

Distill water several times, keep putting through again and again will deplete dieterium as will home freezing. You put your distilled water in the freezer over a few hours and pour out the parts not yet frozen this reduces deuterium, but only by small amounts. You would have to do it many of times to get anywhere worthwhile (maybe .5-2ppm difference per go around.) The good news is that every time you loop your orin its just the same as putting through a distiller getting cleaner and cleaner everytime. You are depleting dieterium and cleaning your own body's water every single time you loop it. You dump the toxins at the liver which get excreted, and your own body's water gets cleaner and higher quality every single loop.

You want to arrange your life in such a way that you make the DDW right within your body.
Ideally, do not spend any or much $$ on buying DDW (even if money is no object).
Reason.
You want the right type of water (in the right place)made by your own body.
Even the best DDW if drank will not make it to the right place.
If you make it within your matrix you get two benefits for the price of one.

Then you want to loop this perfect water and get it cleaner and higher quality every time you loop it.

Another way to improve your own water as well as getting as much sun as possible is through Magnetism grounding everyday, as much skin contact with the ground as possible. Minimise EMFs, sleep inside silver threaded faraday canopy to protect your cell while you sleep.

With all that in mind Here is my updated omad orin looping protocol for the 2020s. These are the new protocols I have added to the omad orin looping routine.....

1\. Wake up at dawn and drink from the container of Orin by my bedside while still in bed. Then get up imediediately head outside to watch the sunrise. Wearing nothing but kiniki tan through shorts (which also are more effective for grounding) on some grass useually wet with dew. Then do 100 or more full life salutes. The full life salute is where your chest touches the ground and you lift your hands up as high as possible. Then push up, stand up stretch as high as possible as you jump up and then down to repeat. So your body has as much contact with 5he ground.

Even do this throughout the year, don't worry on cold mornings you won't get frost bite in that short time even in the snow. It's very good for you. After 100 or more life salutes you build up a sweat, and your chest has had plenty of contact with the ground so afterwords I turn over and lay on my back looking up at the sky, or as near to the sun as possible while my heart beat is raised and I'm breathing huge lungs full of air.

Even on cloudy days the light spectrum is still going to do the job with your circadian rhythms. This morning routine is so beneficial in multiple ways. Firstly you are gets the morning sun light spectrum in your eyes and on your skin which is so important. You are breathing fresh morning air into your lungs after being inside sleeping all night. Although we do leave windows open a jar all night. Then you are raising your pulse pumping blood and oxygen and you are deep breathing at the same time from the exertion.

You are grounding your whole body to wet grass which is perfect conductivity. Perhaps most importantly you are starting the process of burning fat for energy which actually gives you more energy the rest of the day.

2\. Most mornings I do aged orin full body rub downs while outside looking towards the sun. All the time drinking from the container that I filled from the night before. I drink through my nose and wash my eyes nd era with it. Then use some to style my hair for the day. Afterwards using a spray bottle of colloidal silver, DMSO and a mixture of essential oils I rub this in all over my body which has now cooled down and my heart rate and breathing have returned to normal. I head back inside cleaning my bare feet very well before getting dressed for work.

3\. After this morning routine I'm useually ready for a good bowel movement. Everything from the one meal the night before. And I try to finish drinking anything left in the container if there is any. The first part of which may have already gone through you providing a top to bottom enema cleaning you right the way through. The bowels should then be absolutely empty and clean for the rest of the day.

As a family we then consider a scriptural thought from the Bible and say a prayer together as the kids get ready for school and my wife and I get ready for work. We all head out about 8:15.

4\. Looping every few hours whenever the bladder is full. To start with you do taste a little of the aged orin, DMSO and essential oils that were absorbed through the skin. This will not take you out of a fasted state. As I'm a window cleaner I am outside most of the time taking in the Suns full light spectrum as it changes throughout the day. If you have to be inside for some reason much of the day then make sure you get outside as often as possible to look at the sun and breathing outside clean air. at least every hour for a few mins minimum which lets the Suns light spectrum set your circadian rhythms correctly.

5\. Have last loop around 4:30-4:40pm a good 20mins before your one hour eating window. Just before start the eating window do another 100 or more full life salutes outside wearing only shorts. All the way Same benefits as before but even more incredible to me fat burning as you have been fasting for 23hrs. Then at 5pm on the dot start sipping the one large smoothie chewing each mouthful mixing with essential saliva which is an important part of the digestive process. Then eat and enjoy the one plate meal, chewing and savouring every single mouthful.

6\. Rest to digest your one meal, sit around the dinner table talking about the big and small things in life. About the time the sun starts to go down spend some time outside again and do some sun gazing before it's gone for the day. This tells your body to start getting ready for sleep.

7\. Sit in empty bath with plug in and do another full body rubdown with aged orin. Using a red light therapy infrared sauna lamp. I do hot yoga and stretching routine while vigorously rubbing in aged orin. Also fill my goggles with aged orin and do orin pulling while doing the hot yoga. From then on keep wearing the goggles which are high quality blue and green light blocking glasses. You can test if they are any good by checking if you can still see any blue or green colours with them. These need to cover the sides as well so as to not let in any harmful lights. Wear these until you lay down to sleep and your circadian rhythms will not be interrupted and you will have very high quality sleep.

8\. Sleep inside a silver shield faraday canopy. This is made from silver threaded material which is the most electrically conductive material known to man. Also sleep on silver threaded sheets and pillow cases which are antibacterial and anti bedbug antimicrobial. The silver has to be completely touching all around you with no gaps. So after both of you getting inside you tuck the canopy in under the mattress making sure no gaps. This creates a safe area inside that no harmful EMFs can penatrate. 5g, wifi, Bluetooth and any other harmful EMFs can't damage your cells at this most important time while your body rests and regenerates.

9\. Dry fast for 12 out of every 24hrs. So after 6pm finishing your one meal do not consume anything no looping anymore. Instead start to fill your container ready to drink tomorrow morning.

[https://www.amazon.co.uk/OMAD-ORIN-LOOPING-DR-Phillips/dp/1726853357](https://www.amazon.co.uk/OMAD-ORIN-LOOPING-DR-Phillips/dp/1726853357)

### Aerose91 — 2019-04-19T17:31:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/need-a-very-gentle-ct-method.23539/post-268434>

For years now I've been trying to incorporate CT into my routine but it always crashes me. Sometimes long-term. For those who may not know my back story I've had a very severe encephalopathy for 7.5 yrs. Diagnosed with Toxic Encephalopathy, M.E., Mast Cell Activation and most recently found an unknown protozoan parasite in my red cells so have added Vector Bourne Encephalopathy to the mix. I'm currently on abx for lyme and just added Malarone & Artimsinin for the protozoa. Dementia, psychosis, depersonalization, confusion, memory loss and exercise intolerance are the worst symptoms.

Anyway, a kind member here a while back told me to try placing an ice pack on my femoral artery as an intro to CT. Lately I've been doing it regularly and I'm mostly OK with it! That's significant. The only issue i get sometimes is it will make me a bit manic or mildly aggressive if i leave it too long.

I want to experiment with something that would be in between what im currently doing and face dunks. I was wondering if putting an ice pack on my carotid artery in my neck may be a step up as it would bring the cold straight to my brain which is where most of my problems are. Even considered trying that while shining an IR light on my stomach/legs as to maybe stimulate a mild fournier effect.

Any advice is really appreciated!

# Thread: Sleep inside a beehive
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-inside-a-beehive.23540/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 24
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Solidsilverteeth — 2019-04-19T17:33:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-inside-a-beehive.23540/post-268435>

im a third generation beekeeper, my father is in his 80s and still full time beekeeping with over 150 colonies.

We heard about this therapy in beekeepers monthly some years ago. It started in the Ukraine in the 1990s an old beekeeper and his wife found out she had cancer. It spread everywhere and the doctor told her she didn't have much time left.

She noticed that when she was in close proximity to the bee hives she always felt better. So much so that she didn't want to leave them, so her husband made a bed for her over some hives and she slept in her bees suit so they couldn't touch her.

So the story goes she got a lot better and outlived the doctors prediction by years. I don't know how true it is, but this was what was published in bee keepers monthly.

Then a few other bee keepers refined the idea, making beds over beehives with very small mesh holes to the the bees can't touch or sting the person sleeping there.

So my father and I have built a sleep on bees pod. The design is you go in and close the door, and sleep on top of four beehives, so hundreds of thousands of bees are only inches away from you.

There is the frequency and magnetism of all those bees, then there is the air you breath in is full of propolis, nectar and pollen.

The sound is also very relaxing. And there are theories about the therapy being very good for your circadium rythums. There were some test done in the Ukraine and apparently some very positive results on blood.

There are now some health farms offering sleep on bees therapy in a few places around the world, one in Canada, and I hope to be the first one the UK

[https://healthywithhoney.com/sleepi...her-way-of-treating-ourselves-with-bees-help/](https://healthywithhoney.com/sleeping-above-beehives-another-way-of-treating-ourselves-with-bees-help/)

I don't know if it's completely relevant, but have you ever heard the mythos surrounding Viktor GREBENNIKOV?

He was apparently a very smart man who studied insects of all varieties and came across something he called the "cavernous structure effect" in the way insects create their homes. He then used this knowledge to make a device to cure headaches using "dry" honeycombs in the photo. Admittedly, when you reach the bits about him making an anti gravity machine from his research on studying insect wings it all gets a bit far fetched for me, but the stuff on cavernous structure emissions is still really fascinating to me and might be for you judging by this thread. Maybe it has something to do with the beds?

Of the many methods of lowering your deuterium levels the one meal a day sounds so simple and natural.

Dr Anne Cooper talks about fasting to clear out deuterium. She said you can eat that junk food occasionally as long as you fast to clear out all that deuterium.

I have been OMAD and orin looping for years now, and it just makes so much sense to me.

You can eat whatever you like on OMAD, as long as you stick to the protocol. And you can have as many splurge days as you want as long as you have a purge for every splurge.

I am very much looking forward to the rumoured cheaper deuterium testing kits, It would be great if we could all experiment with different things to test our deuterium levels.

This is an expert from my book, OMAD ORIN LOOPING.

think some people put too much weight on this idea that the nutrients found in urine are mostly from the food we eat. I have seen very good evidence, however, that this is not true because at least several key nutrients in urine are present in amounts much, much larger than could possibly be obtained from food, such as Vitamins B1 (Thiamine), B6, Folic Acid, and Biotin.
In the Book "Urinalysis in Clinical Laboratory Practice" by Helen M. Free, in section 4 in the table of contents (Nature and Composition of Urine from Healthy Subjects) one is able to see the list of constituents measured in the daily pass of urine.
The most interesting thing to me is that the amounts of several important nutrients are found in amounts many, many times higher than it is possible to obtain them from food. In other words, these nutrients are present in urine in orthomolecular dosages, basically megadoses that far exceed what is possible to obtain from food.
This to me indicates that the body produces and multiplies its own nutrients, because if what showed up in our urine was simply the result of what we eat, there would be no way that, for example, our urine could contain 4mg per day of Folic Acid (that is 4,000 micrograms, and most people get well under 800 micrograms in their diet. Or 35mg of biotin per day. That is 35,000 micrograms of biotin. The average person gets around 300 micrograms or less in the diet. That is also the "Recommended Daily Allowance". 35,000 micrograms is a very large orthomolecular dose and even the highest dose supplements don't have that much in one tablet. It's well known that biotin is produced in the body, but I believe that all or most of the known and as yet unknown nutrients actually are produced and multiplied by the body, including known and so far unidentified/unknown vits and minerals.
Thiamine, Vitamin B-1. As just one example 200mg per day! Most people don't even get 5mg from food. It's impossible to get anywhere near 200mg from food, the only way is through supplementation....or urine! And on omad orin looping all these good things go up by large amounts.
Vitamin B-6. 100mg per day. A large orthomolecular dose, again only obtainable through supplementation or urine. This can be true of all other beneficial nutrients.
So it is not true that the nutrients in orin mostly come from food, they mostly come from your body but it is true that what you eat affects the quality of the Orin. I’m not saying that what you eat isn’t important, but I am saying that your own urine is the very best supplement you could ever take.
Imagine a supplement that can change throughout the day and give your body exactly what it needs at the right time, exactly what the body needs at that time and is bio available recognised to be used straight away. You just imagined your own orin.

When it comes to minerals, there are two kinds alive and dead. Or another way to say it is organic and inorganic.

Spring water used to be pure rain water and now it has picked up a load of dead inorganic minerals. The lower ppm the better, but zero ppm is best.

Instead of filtering water, trying to take the dirt out of the water, why not get a distiller and take the water out of th dirt.

Take iron for example. If you find an old piece of junk metal and somehow powder it up and stir it into some pure water, and get it mostly desolved are you getting your iron for the day? No the body can't use inorganic minerals.

But iron from green leafy veg is organic living iron. It has been chelated, light infused.

Same with ALL the other minerals, you want the living version not the dead version.

Oysters for example provide more organic zinc per standard serving than any other food.

And the best way to rid the body of dead inorganic matter is by drinking the purest distilled water you can get, and there is no more distilled water in the universe than your own urine.

# Thread: Omar Orin looping lifestyle choice
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/omar-orin-looping-lifestyle-choice.23546/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Solidsilverteeth — 2019-04-20T16:31:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/omar-orin-looping-lifestyle-choice.23546/post-268496>

Hi all!

Decided to start my own journal since I have some threads all over the place. Here's a little info about myself:

I'm a 41 year old Brit married to a wonderful Japanese woman. Used to live and work in Tokyo but now we have three children, 10,8&4 years old, we moved back to London.

I'm from Wales originally right by the beach sorounded by tall trees and nature. My elderly parents still live there and have a large property a few hectares of fruit and nut trees. My father is a beekeeper, over 150 colonies.

We built together our first sleep inside a beehive pod, I posted elsewhere about it.The magnetism and good native EMFs you get from the beehive are very healing and seem to be very good for the living cells.

My dream is to move my family back to the countryside and set up a wellness centre on my parents property. It's going to be called Bee Well wellness centre.

Everntually have multiple sleep inside beehive pods so people can come and stay at the centre and every morning we can all walk barefoot to the beach, watch the sunrise and practice CT in the ocean.

I'm also enthusiasticly embracing fasting, and orin (urine) therapy. My longest orin fast has been 27 days only looping orin, nothing else. I plan to do longer orin fasts in the future.

My health retreat will be a place for people to come and do orin fasts if they want to, but if not then just experience sleeping inside beehives and the healing power of nature.

So that's my dream, but at the moment I live on the outskirts of London, which is not as bad as it sounds, we are sorounded by many trees and the air is relatively clean.

For now I eat lots of seafood OMAD and loop all my orin. I wrote a book about the science behind the OMAD orin looping lifestyle choice it's in my signiture.

I welcome any questions about it, and I'm also looking for suggestions as to what other therapies to include in my wellness centre.

We are thinking about float pods, Japanese style onsen with electric shock massage therapy, hot tubs and maybe HALO therapy. Also interested in cryotherapy. We want to have red light therapy in all the pods and have some low EMF infrared saunas. My wife is a very good Japanese massage therapist, and I'm encouraging my kids to get trained as holistic massage therapists as well when they are old enough, they can work at my health farm if they want to.

# Thread: Brand new, thanks for having us!
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 49
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Emma C — 2019-04-20T17:34:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/post-268500>

After about a week of pouring through as many webinars, blogs and forum posts as I can, I thought I'd say hi! While it is CLEAR that my dopamine levels are not to the point of allowing barely any understanding of what Jack teaches (at least not the details) I can say that this information resonates with me and, while it leaves me with SOOOO many questions, it also answers so many!!!

I have read time and time again new members saying, "I'm not, not sure where to start" and this is exactly how I feel. I will not post my whole story here (I think I need to start a journal for that - true?) but I will say it is not just me here. I have SO MUCH skin in the game, as I am raising 5 little future black swans and they need me to figure this out. Plus my husband has started to feel the negative effects of nnEMF and a life on the road.

My husband and I have signed up for the Titanium subscription after going through a whirlwind discovery over the past 5 months. The short condensed version of our journey is the downward slide of our 7 year old who started with "ringing in the ears, grumpiness, and headaches followed by nightly waking, then vision issues (Alice and Wonderland syndrome) and feeling like "the world is shaking". I'm blasting through about 4 months here, as we thought he was just wanting attention, but after a few doctor visits and the three major incidents of obvious memory loss (from a 7 year old!) we are awaiting a pediatric nuerology consult.

My mom-radar was going off like crazy and I told my husband, "it's something in this house!" because, side note: All of our five children have been abnormally sick, constantly and I'm a stickler for healthy eating, plenty of outside time and have enough supplements to start a store (I now see that this was the wrong approach, but you only know what you know). Also, we have other issues we have been trying to solve (ADHD, depression, anxiety, manic episodes, angry outburst, learning disabilities, a brain scan that was interpreted as "a hot mess" and lots of stomach issues - all different children than the 7 year old).

I figure it was mold, or the chemicals from the overspray of the two wineries our farm is between, but upon further investigation, I learned about nnEMFs. HOW DID I NOT KNOW ABOUT THESE????????

We immediately got an EMF consultant out and low and behold, our 7 year old had been sleeping about 2 feet from a smart meter! My daughter, with tremendous issues, was about 4 feet from it AND sleeping in a dirty electricity NIGHTMARE under the breaker box. I have no idea how long it takes to heal from these injuries, but my son started sleeping slightly better once moved to the living room floor (although we have RF from an unidentified cell tower and dirty electricity that we are trying to filter at the breaker box). He still has vision issue (very bad at school, which is wifi central) and has a shaking feeling more nights than not.

Each member of the family has problems that I now believe are directly related to our environment, which is latitude 38 and apparently the new rainforest (as we've had more cloudy rainy days than ever the last year).

I see LOTS of biohacking here and discussion on small items that we can change, but what I'm wondering is....

It seems clear that the BEST thing you can do and the most "bang for the buck" is to move as close to the equator as possible, unplug completely (no grid), stay the hell outside and don't wear shoes.

How many people have done this?
Anyone with lots kids take this leap? In a weird way, this almost seems easier than trying to micromanage the technology, terrible school environment, low sun levels and just general poor health patterns we have gotten stuck in.

I have a sense that if we were able to pull this off, SO many of our struggles would melt away (like my daughter not being able to leave my side for the past year, even when I go to the bathroom. While she has made some small progress with her million supplements, GF/DF diet, neurofeedback, hippotherapy, etc....I'm so over this "pissing in the wind".) I'm ready for change, positive healthy change that will allow us to LIVE our life.

Jack mentions that we need a 23 and me test to see where we need to live. Do we really? Is there any instance where moving closer to the equator is NOT a good idea?

Thanks for reading! I've been looking for a community

This timing DIRECTLY relates to ALL of the kids getting sick constantly. I have not had all 5 kids in school at the same time for weeks. The main issue has been respiratory infections, ear aches and coughs. In fact, my 5 year old JUST got put on his first ever round of antibiotics, liquid steroids and constant nebulizers (he has never had asthma, but now they are talking about this). He can not shake the constant cough and congestion and it all started when we surprisingly got 4G LTE. The other big kicker with moving to the farm was putting all the kids in school, turns out it is just one big technology nightmare. They do screens for EVERYTHING, even art is on ipads (I shit you not). Before that, my kids did have access to technology, but we spent most of our time outside, in the river or in the woods. So, it was not just this farm but also confounded with starting public school.

My husbands DREAM is to throw everyone in a bus and travel  Nathan Campbell is his name and we have a Titanium subscription so he's on here somewhere, but I don't know where. I'm terrible at technology, otherwise I could probably "tag" him or something. I was wondering about RVs, are they safe??? Seems like a big metal box would attract EMFs, also, isn't driving dangerous or at least in some vehicles? I have no idea how, that's on my list of things to read up on. Any specific RVs safer than others?

We were thinking of airbnbing the farm to try and make some money from it since we would get burned on selling it and it is insanely cute and was the farm of our dreams until it started killing us  Plus, we put everything we had into this farm.

I will go start an optimal journal! Should I just do one for me and then do each child separately? When I say we have LOTS of issues, I'm not kidding  It would be too much for one post! Also, I have labs and some information on a couple kids but not others, just trying to figure out how to organize this all. I'll let my husband do his own

I might have read Christine's journal? I will go check. I read one two nights ago that blew me away! But, memory issues are a BIG thing for me, so I don't remember the details.

Thank you again! What wonderful directions.

Emma

### caroline — 2019-04-22T05:21:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/post-268591>

I have written about this here a few times ....but I will bore everyone again. We live in Australia and folks are always on the move in caravans and buses and RV's etc.

We met, recently, a family who had been travelling the last 8 years. They have 3 kiddos - the eldest girl is 12 and has been completely homeschooled in their bus.

I can't even begin to describe how utterly charming and bright and engaged and delightful these kids are.

We have run across this many times in our travels.

My dearest friend in the world - Stella and her husband both quit their jobs and sold their house and bought an RV. They are having the absolute time of their lives touring America ....and really living and loving! They are feeling so much healthier and happier than they have in years. They had lived in Miami BTW - a cesspool of EMF

### caroline — 2019-04-22T05:30:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/post-268594>

Just one more thought .....no one likes to lose money but......If you sold your farm and all became healthy again - how much would you save on medical expenses?

You really can't put a price tag on your health! and I know that you know that!

You are young and healthy and enthusiastic and passionate and you have a like minded partner ...there isn't anything you can't do together.

You and your life partner are in this for the long haul ....make every second count - now that you know better!

Even if you didn't have a penny ....all of you in a bus travelling around and getting to know your country up close and personal - would be an incredible blast!

Just imagine what that would give your kids........

We all know that money isn't everything ....but sometimes we forget.

Hi Caroline,

I will be posting my journal today! I need to go read some to see how to do it  I will absolutely include info on mom and G-mom. I find their history interesting.

Tell me, why is Jack "new and improved"? Does this has something to do with his April webinar about revamping his life? After watching that, I thought he might be gone for good? I TOTALLY get "saving the family" (I'll do anything to pull my kiddos out of the dark side) but I thought for him that might include jumping off technology! I was hoping that was NOT the case, but was confused.

If/when you meet me in person, you'll find I am very unassuming... but, you are correct, fierce is an accurate description (but most do not see this). However, my husband would agree  I am a FIRM believer in being able to do whatever you want, I HATE excuses and there is always someone else in a more difficult situation with a better attitude, so I'm not the right person to whine to. "Know better, do better", period. Not,"know better and bitch about how difficult it is to pull off", that's wasting time. (don't get me wrong, I can absolutely whine! but I'm usually the one to slap myself back out of it and suck it up. We all fall down sometimes.)

I digress....

airport is 30 minutes away and no military base.

### Emma C — 2019-04-22T16:59:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/post-268608>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=268594)
>
> Just one more thought .....no one likes to lose money but......If you sold your farm and all became healthy again - how much would you save on medical expenses?
>
> You really can't put a price tag on your health! and I know that you know that!
>
> You are young and healthy and enthusiastic and passionate and you have a like minded partner ...there isn't anything you can't do together.
>
> You and your life partner are in this for the long haul ....make every second count - now that you know better!
>
> Even if you didn't have a penny ....all of you in a bus travelling around and getting to know your country up close and personal - would be an incredible blast!
>
> Just imagine what that would give your kids........
>
> We all know that money isn't everything ....but sometimes we forget.

I could not agree with this more!!!!!!! And you hit a BIG nail on the head! We have spent thousands and do almost every month on medical expenses. We live very simply and do not spend like many of our friends, but every month the savings is depleted with medical bills, and this is me keeping everyone home, away from doctors for all typical viruses, coughs, colds, flus, etc. that everyone else runs to the doctor for. Until recently, my children had fairly healthy immune systems, but this year we were hit hard. Even then, I did all care at home until my 7 year old started scaring the shit out of us with the vision issues and shaking. We thought he might have a brain tumor or something (I guess he still might).

What we have spent the most on is "alternative care" as our main stream docs gave us NO help on all the issues that I just refused to accept as normal...ADHD, Anxiety, Depression, Manic episodes, ODD, learning disabilities (autism like traits, when I KNOW she is normal), etc.

My husband just said to me in defeat yesterday, "Will the medical bills ever stop?"

I have always felt that there is something basic that these kids are missing. Food/supplements is where we have turned the most and they slightly help, but it's not what I'm looking for. I can "feel" that at their core they are struggling, like they are missing some basic building block, but never in a million years would I have considered light! But why would I not? Have I lost my ability to critically think about a situation and see the obvious? My gut has time and time again pointed me towards the indigenous tribes to find how to make them healthy, but I've had fuzzy glasses on. I missed that they were all IN LIGHT. I was constantly stumped that they all had varied diets, I could not find the thread, even paleo was not it, although closer. And water was another huge miss on my part. I figured they were all near water because it provided for them, but I was not able to consider what it provided for them. I desperately want to understand the science Jack teaches, but I struggle. My brain explodes on sentence three of each blog and I can even remember the topic of discussion.

> Ugh, Atlanta must be tough! Where are you thinking of going, if I may ask?
> _So we are in the city but Atlanta is the "city in the forest" (their new tagline), so we have these 150 foot trees all around us and we're at the bottom of a hill, so we still don't really get much of a cell signal. I'm not sure how the small cells will work where I live because you cannot cut down trees in Atlanta and the topography is so hilly- we have a very strict tree ordinance and people would freak out if the city started letting anyone cut them down. We have a small cell 250 feet down the street but it's right next to huge trees and our cell signal hasn't gotten any better (I still only get one bar). Right now we're thinking about small town New England (I know this probably isn't the usual answer, a move north) but we want to go home and be near family._
>
> We live out in the country by most people's standards and in a very low density population. Actually, my husband and I are heading to Playa del Carmen May 9th, but unfortunately the kids can't come (work trip).
>
> We used to homeschool and our kids health was MUCH better (we were outside a lot), but my sanity was tested  I actually loved homeschooling, but some of the other issues I mentioned above were tough. My husband and I are seriously considering just getting through this year then pulling them out. We have talked about renting out our home and traveling around to "test out" different places like you mentioned. We have NO idea how we'd pull this off, just seems like the right thing to do and we're always up for a challenge  The hardest part is that we live on a farm and traveling with cows and sheep is tough
>
> _\-I totally get the sanity being tested, which isn't why I haven't done it yet. My sisters think my kids are wild (although they are perfect angels at school - they just have a lot of energy and they play rough and dirty). We only have 25 days left of school so I'm planning on headed up to New England and test out my home town at the end of June (I don't know why I haven't done this yet, but I assume it's good because I always feel great there)._
>
> Thanks again for the welcome!
> Emma

### Emma C — 2019-04-22T19:15:44+0300

Hi JanSZ,

My description is misleading. I DREAM of the big farm, but we have 6 acres. However, we do have a dairy cow, three sheep, lots of chickens and some turkeys. Think "homestead". No airports, no nuclear facilities. We have a big reservoir about 4 miles from us that feeds the city with water, not sure that matters but it's the only thing I can think of that is anywhere near. We do have some nice power lines going over the house, but not the massive ones. Electrical company is supposed to bury them (eventually). We live next to a 40 acre cow farm and a kennel on the other side (about 40 acres too). Behind us is a huge winery that sprays a lot and in front of us is another conventional winery that also sprays. We are pretty far out, but have excellent cell coverage as of a few months ago. No idea why. Our EMF consult found 300 ??? (don't know measurements) of RF in our back yard and 80 in kitchen with all our power shut off. We have grounded our metal roof, rewired the house so NO wifi, put filters on anything that needed them and at the breaker box. We turn all breakers off at night except fridge and only allow either the kerosene lamp or Edison bulb once the sun as gone down. We even shut the light off fridge. We have changed to eating dinner while sun is out and all clean up is done before dark so only thing light is needed for is a nice bedtime story. We only start functioning in am once sun is up and we go outside with shoes off and least clothing possible. If we use any screens they are in the middle of the day on the reddest screen setting. We got rid of all cordless phones, turned off all cell phones and got an old school corded phone in kitchen. Last thing we could do would be to paint the front of house walls with a special RF paint and get some special curtains for front windows. We have moved everyones bed away from smart meter as much as possible (we have a small 2 bedroom house for the 7 of us, so sleeping options are very creative  ) We have moved our beds away from the walls that the electrical line goes over and placed everyone's head in the safest spot of room.

### Saichi — 2019-04-23T01:23:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/post-268646>

Emma,

Who was your EMF consult? He didn't give you a copy of the measurements?

300 microwatts which is 0.3 milliwatts per meter isn't bad. Whatever the wineries are spraying probably has a lot to do with it, I'm assuming it's myclobutanil?

Do you know you can hack your smart meter with aluminum foil, fine metal mesh screen, and an 8" duct ring for about $12 and reduce its exposure at least 80%?

You should buy the Trifield meter asap.

### Ski coach — 2019-04-23T02:40:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/post-268656>

I live in Afton, very close to Crozet. I assume you are with Dominion Power. If so, your smart meter can be disabled. Per Dominion website: "We offer a Non-Communicating Meter Option, (Opt-Out) for customers who do not wish to have a fully functional smart meter installed at their home. The Non-Communicating meters are smart meters with both the two-way communication and data storage features disabled"
Kill the meter asap! Good luck.

Hi Saichi,

Yes, we got a report. Our consultant, we felt, was excellent! Very thorough and spent a lot of time explaining things to us. Our report states that it was measured in "microwatts per square meter". Information I have says:

\>0.1 is NO concern
0.1-10 is Slight concern
10-1000 is Severe concern
1000+ Extreme concern

I'm not very happy with my kitchen being 80, even if that is the lower end of severe concern and I'm even more pissed that my yard (the reason we bought this farm) is 300. We LIVE outside and there is nothing we can do about this. Plus, we are very sensitive, apparently. I need to do a trial somewhere "away" to see how I feel, but both my husband and I can "feel" when something is off. We both could immediately feel when the wifi was turned off! The levels in our living room were 30,000 before we removed all wifi.

We LIVE outside and there is nothing we can do about this. Plus, we are very sensitive, apparently. I need to do a trial somewhere "away" to see how I feel, but both my husband and I can "feel" when something is off. We both could immediately feel when the wifi was turned off! The levels in our living room were 30,000 before we removed all wifi.

WOW, 30k is ridiculous, that for sure was a major contributor to all your health problems. My 11 year old router failed few months ago, the new router I got was giving off 5k before I foiled it down to around 1k. And your tech is right even 1k should be at the high end of severe concern. But I've been conditioned by the prevalence of 10k to 30k in many public areas that 1k doesn't even phase me anymore. I've been measuring for a couple years. But scientifically and spiritually I know that's still unacceptable considering quantum biology. Just this morning I got hit with a constant 250k+ of UVC being in the ocean for an hour. Luckily my friend gave me a huge leaf off her aloe plant to apply but that won't heal the destroyed DNA/RNA. Honestly it's difficult going outside anywhere these days.

Do you have solar panels? What disqualifies you from opting out of the meter?

### johnsonmd — 2019-04-23T04:22:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/brand-new-thanks-for-having-us.23547/post-268667>

I love hearing about your journey! I have a huge family too!
I begin with basics: light, water, magnetism. List what you can do for each. Then make your plan. Sounds like you are making progress!

I think: what activities can we do outside to be in the sun. Is there a park we can have picnics, campfires, or play in water or go fishing? Maybe ocean? Is there safer area than home for daily hanging out? Maybe play/ swim in hottub or water trough (put warm water in for kids) at least it is a faraday cage of protection from EMF. Best way to get kids to CT is playing in natural water: lake, ocean, river.

How can we eat more seafood? Lots of mackeral and sardines and whatever is on sale. How can I get kids to eat more oysters? Fish cakes, fish sticks, tuna salad, shrimp everything.

Painting a room doesn't seem to be really effective but there has been success lining a room with chicken wire fence and sheetrock over it to create a faraday cage room.

Grounding pads in house, grounding shoes ( moccasins, cowboy boots with leather soles) maybe table top table tanning light for extra UVA and UVB with Infrared light and full spectrum light to use with it ( only a few minutes a day. )

It would be nice if you could locate a nice place in PDC, Mexico while you are there on your trip. Someplace you could take the kids for a week or two and see how much of a difference it makes in your kids.

Hi Emma,
Wow, you have done a lot to learn about and make adjustments around all this invisible stuff that is hurting you and your family. Kudos on all you've done to bring down the intensity of all the waves that have been assaulting you and your kids.
If you need anymore encouragement to help you get to the place where you can actually do the move, here are a couple of ideas: If your backyard (reason you chose the place) measures at 300 microwatts/meter squared, that is a BIG DEAL for you and for your kids.
To start making the invisable visible to you, you might want to buy a meter that measures RF (radio frequency--cell phones, smart meters, WIFI, etc.) You might also want to buy a meter that measures the magnetic fields that come with anything electrical--can show you the strength (measured in milligauss) of the electric fields around anything electrical in your home and outside. You might want to contact Less EMF.com or Safe Living Technologies or...with questions--they have been helpful to me in the past. You might want to check with the person who did your survey for recommendations. You can do this.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/severe-gerd-hiatus-hernia-symptoms.23549/post-268515>

I’m about 3 weeks into the Leptin RX. I believe that it is working but I’m still having some lingering serious GI/hiatal hernia issues. I’ve removed most fiber/carbs from My diet with the fat exception of avocados. I suffer from chronic benching snd chest pain that plagued me all day even before there is food in my stomach. It’s literally non-stop. I also have intermittent shortness of breath and very slow GI motility. I’m eating seafood for breakfast and dinner, watching the sunrise everyday(I work outside under the sun all day). Wearing my blue blockers after dark. The stomach and hiatus hernia issues basically run my life. I can’t enjoy food anymore and starting to lose lean mass. I can’t imagine I’m absorbing nutrients very well. Is there anything I can do to fix this?

This process is controlled by sunlight and should be uncontrolled by man-made light. Man-created algorithms to try to fix the problems they cause. The AI algorithms made things worse for the public's health. The algorithms served the centralized institutions' profit purpose. Many do not realize these algorithms are a proxy for manufactured light. Manmade light has usurped this process and has led our species down a dark alley of disease. These diseases confound centralized institutions. This has made our brain preoccupied with technological progress, which is now leading to biological disruption. This is the real reason everyone needs to run towards decentralized systems. Nature is that decentralized system. My solar strategy is simple. It is to acquire information about the tactics of 'time' my cells need to win. Without the bounty of solar tactics, the road to Optimal becomes brutal. This is the slowest route to victory for our cells. Tactics without strategy are the noise before the mitochondrial illness. Man must live according to how nature built him to operate in her framework. Mythology didn't cease to exist and be useful to pagans when we gained digital watch technology. # Thread: Mito newbie

### Saichi — 2019-04-21T10:44:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mito-newbie.23551/post-268535>

Hi,

Learned of Jack little over a month ago, knew nothing about light toxicity beforehand. Wasn't expecting this rabbit hole when I thought I had already figured the matrix out. I've learned and forgotten more than I ever wanted to know of the devolution in human consciousness.

I was relatively healthy being born and raised in Tokyo in the early 80s, my parents worked part time at Tsukiji market so we had the freshest seafood every day. After my American mother separated she brought me to her home state of Indiana. I quickly became unhealthy and slightly overweight being raised in a food desert. When I was 10 my dentist fraudulently put 10 amalgams in my teeth, shortly after I received an unknown booster vaccination for school and became severely ill. I went from 115 pounds to 92 pounds in one month. Around 2002 I learned what were in my amalgams and had them all removed following the protocols. Did nutritional chelation of olive oil and raw garlic for a couple weeks and my energy level more than doubled for almost a whole decade after, had no idea I had had CFS most my life till then.

I remember getting my first cell phone around that same time and noticing immediately I would get a headache when I spoke on it for more than a few minutes but didn't know yet why. Around 2003 I read an Ecologist article saying mortality rates in NYC doubled in 1996 after cell masts were introduced, used speaker phone almost exclusively since then.

Hate to admit it but still using wifi, have metal mesh and aluminum foil around the router so my exposure's currently half a mW/m^2 at the moment.

Been 'Paleo' diet for almost a year now primarily grass-fed meats. Highly recommend Italian water buffalo or Gloustershire pork if you can find it. Unfortunately abstain from all Pacific seafood due to Fukushima contamination since 2012. Reluctant to eat seafood when I'm in NY due to microplastics.

I started CT today in the Pacific Ocean in far Northern California. I didn't keep track of time but probably a good fifteen minutes neck down before I had to get out, didn't expect to enjoy it and the rest of the day as much as I did. I see it nothing short of a revelation and wish I knew of this years before. Made the mistake of not covering up right after in extreme chilly wind, checking my stupid phone, but I've usually learned the hard way.

### Solidsilverteeth — 2019-04-21T11:00:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mito-newbie.23551/post-268536>

Hi Saichi,

I lived and worked in Tokyo through my 30s and married a wonderful Japanese woman.

What is your morning routine? Do you excercise at sunrise?

Cold therapy is the best faraday cage to protect you from a bad environment. Morning sunrise is the only way to reset your bodies hormones to begin the healing. This will increase beneficial compounds and increase the quality of your orin. The next orin you produce will be perfectly structured and high quality.
Without morning sun especially at sunrise and between sunrise and 10am you get a fail!!! Mediating our technological,cell phone blue lit microwave environment is one thing and healing is another. Do your best to minimise nnEMFs but concentrate on morning sun and cold therapy first.
If you are unable to move near to the equator you must drink clean pure water zero PPM see the sunrise grounded and be connected to the earth. When you are outside get as naked as possible, kinicki shorts if you can't be nude. And covered up when you are inside in artificial lights. After watching the sunset wear large red tinted blue light blockers, and a hoodie to protect your skin from harmful EMFs.
I wear kinicki tan through shorts and get outside on the cold grass as soon as wake up. Doing burpies on the ground at sunrise. Build up a sweat then lay on the ground looking at the sunrise. Then rub down with aged orin. Then cold water therapy shower outside while looking at the sun. This is the best ever faraday cage to protect from a bad environment. Yes the cold water after is a shock but your body gets to it. I have to hav a good wash with outside tap or my wife gets mad if I ever bring any grass in the house, or if I'm still sweaty after morning excercise. So this helps me get in the cold water for longer even though it is such a shock.
Washing feet off then head inside and dry off with a towel. Then sit in front of open window while watching the rest of the sunrise and get the family ready for work or school, plan the day. Drink more pure water zero PPM in the sunlight which helps energise and structure the molecules.
Have a good bowel movement about 8am, all those burpies and the cold shower help to get things moving. Then head out for work, take kids to school. I'm a pure water window cleaner working outside all day. Loop all Orin and look at the sun regularly all day. Don't consume anything that will take the body out of a fasted state. Then before 5pm one meal eating window do another hit session of burpies. This is a very special optimal time to burn fat for energy.
Then eat one plate meal with one drink in one hour. Seafood and keto high fat.
Then watch sunset.

Then do dental hygiene routine. And cold therapy while using red light and do aged Orin rub downs. Then wear blue blockers before sleep.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-04-21T17:24:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mito-newbie.23551/post-268553>

None of us can choose where we shall love........I love my tribe and try to inflict my passion for them for Optimal health. Your vibe attracts your tribe. When we are in love with something, we tap our passion for it and for LIFE. We become convinced nobody else will do the things for us......so we begin to do for ourselves at light speed. It is transformative. What does the butterfly realize when it looks back at its caterpillar shell in the cacoon? One can never speak butterfly to a caterpillar.........THIS SITE IS BUILT FOR BUTTERFLIES. IT IS NOT FOR CATERPILLARS and this is why some people move on. But as time goes, others do for themselves and often do, much much better as a result when they learn the value of carrying their own water in their transformation. You need to feel the blood in your mouth to get to the essence of why you must travel roads no one even considers.

### Saichi — 2019-04-21T21:03:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mito-newbie.23551/post-268575>

Your direct poetry's as pertinent as your science knowledge.

SST, my circadian rhythm's been off ever since I came to the states. Honestly can't remember what year the last time I saw a sunrise was. Typing that out after what I just learned and what you all already know is just about beyond words. Changing my sleep schedule's on top of my list, usually don't sleep before 2am so once I fix that then I can see a sunrise.

8:30 this morning I measured 1 microwatt/cm^2 btwn 246 and 262nm from the sun. If equal throughout entire spectrum of UVC that would be approximately 11 microwatts/cm^2. Back in early 2000s I used to sunbathe four or five days a week at Prospect Park in Brooklyn in my swimming trunks towel on grass without sunscreen anywhere from 40 to 90 minutes equal time split torso and back. Getting a tan was the purpose but it made me feel probably the best I ever felt in general, I learned my limit was about 2 hours before I'd get sunburn. About seven years ago I started playing competitive recreational volleyball on the beach and I noticed I'd burn within 20 minutes if I didn't wear Green Screen Organic sunscreen which I almost always did because we used to play all day. I thought I was just getting old and couldn't handle the sun anymore. Last year I learned we've destroyed over 80% of the ozone layer due to thousands of factories in China using CFC-11 for the past decade along with global geoengineering and interaction of increased permafrost methane in the atmosphere. UVC's now a brand new experience for the earth's surface and life, also could be responsible for the insect apocalypse occurring since they're exoskeletal. I've decided to only be in direct sun for first hour of sunrise and last hour of sunset or when it's cloudy out. My bio hack which won't arrive till middle May is a small glass greenhouse which will block all UVC and approximately 70% of UVB so I can sunbathe during the day.

I have very good friends my age who own, live, and work small scale organic food farms many of whom have to be in the sun all day and most of them look 20 years older than me now. Breaks my heart knowing this.

### Silverteeth — 2019-04-21T14:42:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.23552/post-268539>

ho all, I have some very basic questions about DDW.

1\. How is it made? Whatever process is used by the people who sell DDW can this be done at home?

2\. How is it measured? Is pure distilled water low deuterium if it is zero PPM, and how can it be made even lower deuterium? If you put it through the distiller again and again it gets more pure every time, does this also affect the hydrogen.

### Katie Durham — 2019-04-21T14:46:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.23552/post-268540>

Deuterium is pure water, but with a neutron.

### Silverteeth — 2019-04-21T14:48:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.23552/post-268541>

> [Katie Durham said:](/goto/post?id=268540)
>
> Deuterium is pure water, but with a neutron.

Thanks Kate
Do you know how the people who sell it make it?

### Silverteeth — 2019-04-21T14:49:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.23552/post-268542>

Does anybody know if distilling water several times over does indeed deplete the deuterium as some claim?

Has there been any studies?

### Silverteeth — 2019-04-21T14:54:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.23552/post-268543>

I see the conpanies say things like "Deuterium content can be measured by mass spectrometry and laser-based techniques."

Can this be done with a spectrometer at home?

They say it's very energy demanding to lower the D levels, is there an easier more efficient way?
"

**What is the method of reducing deuterium level in water?**
Deuterium-depleted water is produced by an energy-demanding technology based on differences in the physicochemical properties of normal water (H2O) and heavy water (D2O). Due to a boiling point difference of merely 1.5°C, the concentration of heavy water (with higher boiling point) is lower in the vapour phase and this fact is utilized for producing deuterium-depleted water. By repeating evaporation several times in so-called distillation columns, the deuterium content of water can be reduced to any level.

**Is there a way to produce home-made deuterium-depleted water?**
By means of home distillers, not more than 1 ppm decrease can be achieved by single, or 2-3 ppm by double distillation, and this is insignificantly little change in the deuterium concentration of water. Substantial decrease of deuterium content in water can be achieved only by an industrial scale technology, fractional distillation. Preventa products contain 15 to 84% less deuterium than our natural waters, whereas home distillers alter the deuterium content of water by a mere 1-1.5%.

### Silverteeth — 2019-04-21T15:13:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.23552/post-268545>

If you did it 10x then it's about the same as the expensive DDW?

The cost of distilling my water 10x is still not as much as buying it and paying delivery charges.

Long before I heard about DDW I heard it was a good idea to distill water several times to get it really pure, now I am thinking to distill it at least ten times.

As soon as it's finished the cycle I just pour the gallon back into the distillation chamber and push the bottom again. Then do it again and again.

I would love to be able to measure it

# Thread: THE NEW MONSTER LEPTIN Rx thread:
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-monster-leptin-rx-thread.23553/>
**Subforum:** The Epi-Paleo Diet
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2019-04-21T17:05:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-monster-leptin-rx-thread.23553/post-268550>

I recently re-read chapter 12 of my book, The Epi-Paleo Rx and I have decided to light a new fire here on my site.

That thread was a springboard of many things for me that allowed me to find my passion.

So I want to do it again and hopefully, it will help many of you find your passion for what you need in your life right now.

Everyone starts out the same way in life. Shit at what they do. You learn, and you improve, and you make tiny little changes every day to become better than you were yesterday. That’s how every scientist,, physician, artist, writer, founder, lover, and designer built their careers and armamentarium.
So when you look back at the work you did in this life, you can’t feel ashamed of your work. Celebrate your connection to it, because it proves your progress, and it shows how fucking hard you worked to get here, now! Be passionate about yourself and your life. It is you and you must own it.

Enthusiasm can help you find the new doors, but it takes passion to open them. If you have a strong purpose in life, you don't have to be pushed. Your passion will drive you there. [#Sunrise](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/sunrise?source=feed_text&epa=HASHTAG&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARD_zJtOWbZnV9PkKX-oiZYnFmVE0Z1y_Vun6wsUxpXCYePS9ER192jm4_GWXuoOqvLeKjMfUMmeuMB6q4G9LiLcjYkRmoHHFzsQXx9iolvuzwTYgPVNmwIc6NdNV9IVC1yJyA5-BgvVacyHUMDBXUKfAovqsQSHBzMl35VAJ-9zlrhsMybnwd4IX_8qbRE-NfVOJBIA7ji5gEPa-mvFVEX_4MOCpqazan38qxKW813xaVvI4o2UB-70LtbCplh3pASDkZJo750mRLXOA3kNHeaKp-kFlXgukhYgsG_Dxk4P7bVwv5azWCTVrRQqYEKU08p32LMOBlYVtDVqRUtte8Q3iL9B1pQRcjdwQNfkQVpVJnCwu2u5JdQ_ABXPNi_8zREou3eb7vVaZQdZgwXQnFMOUeisGhKIxSUI_n-EZfffhSg&__tn__=%2ANK-R) [#Downloadingbegins](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/downloadingbegins?source=feed_text&epa=HASHTAG&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARD_zJtOWbZnV9PkKX-oiZYnFmVE0Z1y_Vun6wsUxpXCYePS9ER192jm4_GWXuoOqvLeKjMfUMmeuMB6q4G9LiLcjYkRmoHHFzsQXx9iolvuzwTYgPVNmwIc6NdNV9IVC1yJyA5-BgvVacyHUMDBXUKfAovqsQSHBzMl35VAJ-9zlrhsMybnwd4IX_8qbRE-NfVOJBIA7ji5gEPa-mvFVEX_4MOCpqazan38qxKW813xaVvI4o2UB-70LtbCplh3pASDkZJo750mRLXOA3kNHeaKp-kFlXgukhYgsG_Dxk4P7bVwv5azWCTVrRQqYEKU08p32LMOBlYVtDVqRUtte8Q3iL9B1pQRcjdwQNfkQVpVJnCwu2u5JdQ_ABXPNi_8zREou3eb7vVaZQdZgwXQnFMOUeisGhKIxSUI_n-EZfffhSg&__tn__=%2ANK-R)

**STUDY:**

"New study out of Dr. Heilbronn's lab confirms previous reports that eTRF > skipping breakfast: It looks like Uncle Jack's Leptin Rx was a winner. When you skip breakfast and eat a late dinner you are killing yourself. If you subtract the sun while doing those two things you will become a medical cripple and become addicted to prescription drugs and your doctors. #BlackSwanWisdom #LeptinRx [https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/oby.22449#.XLoJjv3rm4s.twitter](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/oby.22449#.XLoJjv3rm4s.twitter) … #sunrise #biophysics

Food is just another 'minor' connection to Nature. Light is the most dominant connection to nature followed by darkness at night. Sun makes food, you eat food, the sun is designed to work with food inside your body. In this way, seasonal foods will provide the most coherence between you and Nature. Food cannot be your medicine when you make chronic mistakes around sunlight and darkness. It is the biggest fallacy in all of medicine, functional medicine, and food gurus.

If you have a strong purpose in life, you don't have to be pushed to action. Your passion will drive you there so you can meet your destiny. Nobody cares if you can't dance well in the party of life. Few realize this. Just get up and dance no matter where you are. Great dancers are great because they tap their passion and follow the music they make in their own mind as the move. Action is a key ingredient for finding your passion.

# Thread: Ready for ACTION... Emma and family (+6) = 7 black swans
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ready-for-action-emma-and-family-6-7-black-swans.23556/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 53
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Emma C — 2019-04-22T18:44:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ready-for-action-emma-and-family-6-7-black-swans.23556/post-268618>

I suspect these first few posts will be a hot mess... forgive me, but don't go easy because, we are ready for change.

I have created a welcome post and spent WAY to long at this coffee shop reading through everything suggested. Next step, "create my journal". I love to-do lists.

After about an hour reading, I started reading the entries from the bottom up (I'm not kidding) my mind is swirling and I can not comprehend much. My heart is racing, ears ringing, hands and lower arm tingling. I feel on the verge of a panic attack. This is normal if I'm on technology, but until about 3 weeks ago I would be baffled by this and think it must have been from something I ate or too much caffeine. \*Sigh

\- age 39
\- 5' 7 1/2"
\- 120 lbs (used to weigh about 140 lbs but lost an extra 5 lbs after each pregnancy - I'm not complaining!)
\- married (spouse is on here too!)
\- 5 biological kids (age: 12, 9, 9, 8, 6) all boys but the middle one
\*lots of issues here, but I'm goin to follow Caroline's suggestion of starting with my own journey. I'll soon follow up with more on these little crazies!
\- 1 step daughter who is the poster child for a "Millennial" age 22
\- look healthy on the outside
\- spastic colon (diagnosed at 11 - prescribed Donatol?)
\- chronic strep and UTIs growing up (lots of antibiotics!)
\- tonsils out at age 10
\- from Evansville, IN (18 years)
\- college/grad school in St. Louis, MO (4 years)
\- age 22 moved to central Maine and had chronic bronchitis, uti's and colds
\- age 23 moved to VA and got better, but still got lots of colds which would turn to upper respirator infections
\- IBS (diagnosed about 6 years ago)
\- SIBO (diagnosed this year)
\- yeast over growth (diagnosed a month ago - suggested Candida-stat)
\- anxiety
\- panic episodes - happen around 11 pm - 2 am. shaking, very cold, thinking I'll vomit, but don't, diarrhea
\- ringing in ears about 6-12 months. Had concussion from getting rammed from our ram (yes, I see the irony) and this was the first time anyone asked about ringing, at which time I said yes, I have ringing, but I suspect I did before that too and just didn't pay as much attention to it. Ringing has progressively gotten worse.
\- terrible grinding of teeth
\- terrible dental health: first cavity at age 3, 25 cavities by age 18 even though I was a fanatical brusher/flosser and went to dentist regularly. All of these 25 were silver fillings. I've had them all replaced. I have two root canals that always hurt and need two more due to cracked teeth from grinding. Dentist wants to put in ALF to realign jaw. Major gum recession that leaves all teeth hurting and hard to chew.
\- back injury that has caused pain since I was about 13. I was a competitive gymnast and had a nasty fall.
\- chronic BV/yeast
\- prescribed glasses at age 13 and haven't taken them off for 26 years, until two weeks ago when my husband read that they are blocking the sun. Last two weeks I have only worn them to drive. I also used to wear prescription sunglasses outside, interestingly, those broke last week after 5 years. Nothing happened, they were in their case and when I opened it, they were shattered. Okay universe, I get the point.

Most recently experiencing cognitive decline, to the point where I went to the functional medicine doc and told her I was getting Alzheimers. I can not recall everyday words and just seem in a fog.

Please excuse misspelling, I also have some "form of dyslexia" I was told in elementary school - so I'm some strange mix of stupid/smart. Aren't we all

Mother - age 69, until recently was the healthiest person I know. NEVER EVER got sick, no matter what. Had NO sympathy for my illnesses as a child, but took good care of me. Last 5 years or so, she got an upper respirator infection that would not clear, turned to asthma, put on lots of meds (don't know what all but steroids and inhalers and others) after 2 years she got better. I think this was precipitated by lymes disease a few years back.

Grandmother (mother's side) - Diagnosed with Alzheimers around 40, had a slow decline and died when I was 5, so maybe 68. She was in coma whenever I saw her. She was a home economist and my mother remembers her always mixing chemical concoctions and telling my mom and sister to "stay away". She gardened and put lots of chemicals on food, according to my mom.

Great-Grandmother (Emma - whom I'm named after and told I'm like) was tall, very thin and very dark skinned. She barely ate because she had stomach issues but never complained. She lived off the land and was independent to a fault. Died of pneumonia in her 80s.

Labs: I've had a nutritional test done, but that's all. Showed extremely low magnesium, and all B vitamins low. Oh and all fungals were high. SIBO was bad said doc and wanted me to do an antibiotic then two months of herbals.

I eat mostly paleo, but have NEVER eaten much seafood. Didn't even touch fish until college when I probably ate it 4 times. I've tried lobster in ME once. My husband is deathly allergic to shellfish, so I have not attempted to cook that. We've been a chicken/steak kinda family (we've raised our own meat birds and butchered - so I'd MUCH rather fish). I have NO idea what an oyster would taste like or how to desensitize my husband to this???? I don't even know where you would buy them. We have taken fish oil for years, but I read Jack said this is a no no. Why? Can someone point me in the direction of his explanation of the no fish oil supplement please?

Thanks for reading!
Thanks for the community
Ready for the adventure!

E

### Emma C — 2019-04-23T20:06:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ready-for-action-emma-and-family-6-7-black-swans.23556/post-268719>

Day 2 of journal:

Bought, cooked and ate first oysters!!!!

feel smarter already

Not sure why I read so many people saying they are yucky. I thought they were DELICIOUS! Yum! Made 3 (wasn't sure what to expect) then had to go back and make more. I had some pistachios with them then thought, um, wait, these don't grow in Virginia. Oops. Baby steps.

I had three farm raised (by me) eggs for breakfast, so that's good!

Oh and sunrise with no shoes, 24 oz of water and a freezing ass shower (then the eggs). Heading out for midday sun now and bought some fish for dinner, kids are going to kill me, lol....we've eaten fish three days in a row. It's to the point now that they'd rather eat the brussel sprouts than another bite of fish. 5 year old walks around screaming "I hate cod," like it's some kinda team chant.
